info.title: REST Countries API
info.description: Get country information including population, languages, currencies, and more

get.description: Search for a country by its name and get detailed information including capital, population, region, languages, currencies, timezones, and borders

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The country name to search for

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. name,capital,population,currencies,languages,timezones,region,subregion,borders,flags)
